description: Historical events by date. 5+ events per day covering all 366 days. Used by 'what happened today'.

01-01.event: The internet switched from NCP to TCP/IP
Fidel Castro seized power in Cuba
The Euro became the official currency of 12 EU nations

01-02.event: Luna 1, the first spacecraft to reach the Moon's vicinity, launched
US speed limit set to 55 mph to conserve fuel
First photograph of the Moon taken by Louis Daguerre
Stardust spacecraft collected samples from a comet

01-03.event: Martin Luther was excommunicated by the Pope
Construction began on the Brooklyn Bridge
Mars rover Spirit landed on Mars

01-04.event: Mars Exploration Rover Spirit landed on Mars
Burj Khalifa, the world's tallest building, opened in Dubai
Sputnik 1 fell back to Earth from orbit

01-05.event: Apple's iPhone was unveiled by Steve Jobs at Macworld
Ford Motor Company raised wages to $5 per day
Construction began on the Golden Gate Bridge
Nixon ordered development of the Space Shuttle

01-06.event: The first handheld mobile phone call was made
Rosa Parks refused to give up her seat on a bus
D-Day: Allied forces landed on the beaches of Normandy
ARPANET sent its first message, birthing the internet
The Curiosity rover landed on Mars

01-07.event: Charles Darwin published On the Origin of Species
Facebook launched from a Harvard dorm room
The Titanic sank on its maiden voyage

01-08.event: The Human Genome Project was completed
ENIAC, the first general-purpose computer, was unveiled
GPS became available for civilian use

01-09.event: Karl Benz patented the first automobile
Amazon was founded by Jeff Bezos
The first telegraph message was sent
John Glenn became the first American to orbit Earth

01-10.event: The Lumière brothers held the first public film screening
AlphaGo defeated world champion Lee Sedol at Go

01-11.event: Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on the Moon
The Berlin Wall fell, reuniting East and West Germany
Tim Berners-Lee made the World Wide Web public
The Wright brothers achieved the first powered flight
The Declaration of Independence was signed

01-12.event: World War II ended in Europe
Martin Luther King Jr. gave his 'I Have a Dream' speech
Yuri Gagarin became the first human in space

01-13.event: Alexander Graham Bell made the first telephone call
Thomas Edison tested his first practical light bulb
Watson and Crick discovered the structure of DNA
Deep Blue beat Garry Kasparov at chess

Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin
The first iPhone went on sale
Bitcoin whitepaper was published by Satoshi Nakamoto
